ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "time" REAL /* Time it took to run the model */,
  "memory" REAL /* Memory used by the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean squared error of the model */,
  "r2" REAL /* R-squared value of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Status of the ownership (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ownership_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ownership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating value (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_categories_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity text */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_activity_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_team_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_team_ownership_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_team_ownership_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., member, leader) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the membership was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
